title: Greek Keto Bean Salad
description: A keto twist on a classic salad, featuring creamy greek yogurt, tender beans, and crunchy salad. Enjoy as a light lunch or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the green beans, mixed greens, and red onion.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt and salad dressing.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the bean and greens mixture, and toss to coat.
If using feta cheese, sprinkle it on top of the salad.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve cold, garnished with additional feta cheese if desired.
